query:
SELECT key   AS "key!: String",
                   name  AS "name!: String",
                   color AS "color!: String",
                   icon  AS "icon!: String"
            FROM   projects
            WHERE  id = ANY($1) AND deleted_at IS NULL
              AND (key ILIKE $2 || '%' OR name % $2)
            ORDER BY (key ILIKE $2 || '%') DESC, similarity(name, $2) DESC
            LIMIT  $3
